title: sideropogon lasianthum
intro: Sideropogon lasianthum, also known as the Thai lemongrass, is a type of plant in the Poaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sideropogon lasianthum include relieving digestive problems, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
